arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus are said to be seriously considering a move for Napoli striker Victor Osimhen, who is on loan at Galatasaray. The Nigerian’s situation was quite a difficult…

Juventus are unbeaten in their last 24 Serie A matches against Bologna (W17 D7), their longest unbeaten run in the competition. In their last 11 home league games against Bologna, Juventus have always alternated between conceding and keeping a clean sheet.
